productDisplayName: Gas Men Navy Blue Flip Flops
description: Walking on a pair of these flip flops from gas feels like walking on cotton. To add oodles of style, team these flip-flops with casual denims and a comfort Fit tee. Upper Synthetic upper with wide woven straps for added comfort and style Toe separator to hold foot in place Brand name on the strap for style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfort Outsole TPR outsole with brand name in horizontal ridges that doubles as suction points and has maxium grip and traction Care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
